PROJECT 03

ZENSAGE Grounded

Project Type Apparel Design
Duration 5 Weeks
Focus Area Grounded Style
Deliverables Garments / Studio Finish

The Challenge

ZENSAGE sought a calm, grounded apparel collection that combined organic elements with structural design. The pieces needed to feel premium, heavyweight, and visually balanced.

The Solution

We built an apparel layout system with earth-toned aesthetics and clean wearable graphics. Every detail was refined to produce a balanced, premium studio finish for the collection.
